blockers: Source evidence is captured but not reviewed.
Observed Trends, Awards, and Bottom Nav sections are not implemented in the runtime surface.
Required versus optional module boundaries are only partially validated.
No-data, goal-completed, overachieved, permission-denied, and unavailable-data states are not runtime-tested.
Semantic tokens remain pending and raw token values are not extracted.
Accessibility expectations are not reviewed enough for promotion.
candidates.nextAction: Keep SummaryDashboard in reverse surface and decide whether Trends and Awards need separate contracts before further optional-module validation.

blockers: Exact source geometry, stroke behavior, and color-variable mapping are not confirmed.
Accessibility behavior is drafted but not reviewed with assistive technology or automated checks.
Unavailable state semantics need product-level confirmation before promotion.
Transfer beyond the captured Activity context is not yet proven.
candidates.nextAction: Review source-backed geometry, unavailable semantics, and accessibility behavior before considering promotion.

blockers: MetricCard versus WorkoutItem boundary is documented, but cross-component composition is not reviewed.
Accessibility behavior is drafted but not reviewed with assistive technology or automated checks.
Source typography, spacing, and color values are not confirmed.
Interactive or navigational behavior is runtime-tested only as a local synthetic target.
candidates.nextAction: Keep MetricCard scoped to compact metric display and review source-backed visual rules before promotion.

blockers: WorkoutItem has minimum runtime stories but is not integrated into SummaryDashboard.
Input contract and accessibility behavior are drafted but not reviewed with assistive technology or automated checks.
Relationship to internal MetricCard-like metric values is documented only as a boundary principle.
candidates.nextAction: Review WorkoutItem runtime results and decide whether SummaryDashboard optional-module validation should include it before any promotion.

notes: Promotion status is intentionally separate from sourceStatus. runtime-tested-minimum does not mean promoted.
